# ערב מגשים אצל דניאל — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A vibrant and colorful private event invitation for a 'maga'shim' (tray/platter) evening hosted by Daniel, running from 20:00 to midnight. Each invited guest or pair is assigned a unique color, creating a rainbow-themed gathering with a fun, festive, and personalized atmosphere. The event features 9 color assignments spanning the full spectrum, giving the invitation a joyful, celebratory, and visually rich identity.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
גלו ערב מגשים פרטי וחגיגי אצל דניאל, עם אווירה קסומה מהשעה 20:00 ועד חצות. כל אורח מקבל צבע ייחודי משלו ליצירת חוויה אישית וסוחפת. היכנסו עכשיו לפרטים המלאים!

Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

---

## How to Contact Us

- Address: יפה נוף , חדרה , ישראל

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About ערב מגשים אצל דניאל
A vibrant and colorful private event invitation for a 'maga'shim' (tray/platter) evening hosted by Daniel, running from 20:00 to midnight. Each invited guest or pair is assigned a unique color, creating a rainbow-themed gathering with a fun, festive, and personalized atmosphere. The event features 9 color assignments spanning the full spectrum, giving the invitation a joyful, celebratory, and visually rich identity.

## Target Audience
- חברות מוזמנות לערב מגשים

## Industry
Private Event Invitation

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
